CustomField.description: The API name of the target fields seperated by semicolons on reduivy__Study_Intake__c where the count should be stored (e.g., reduivy__Approved_Applications__c;reduivy__Booked_Places__c).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The API name of the target fields seperated by semicolons on reduivy__Study_Intake__c where the count should be stored (e.g., reduivy__Approved_Applications__c;reduivy__Booked_Places__c).
CustomField.label: Rollup Field API Name
